news.headline: New era as Apple names new boss to replace Tim Cook after 15 years
news.summary: Ternus will take over running the technology giant in September as Cook steps up to become executive chairman.

news.headline: JI files contempt plea against Nepra over loadshedding in Karachi
news.summary:
<p>KARACHI: The Jamaat-i-Islami (JI) on Monday filed an application in the Sindh High Court and sought contempt proceedings against officials of the National Electric Power Regulatory Authority (Nepra) for not implementing an earlier court order about loadshedding in the city.</p>

news.headline: NBA: Victor Wembanyama named first unanimous defensive player of the year
news.summary: Victor Wembanyama is the youngest Defensive Player of the Year in NBA history, and the first to win the award unanimously.

news.headline: US veterans arrested in Capitol during protest against the war on Iran
news.summary: US veterans were arrested while staging a protest in the US Capitol building in opposition to the war on Iran.

news.headline: ‘All risks must be controlled,’ John Lee says as he defends basketball betting U-turn
news.summary:
Hong Kong’s leader has defended the government’s decision to put the legalisation of basketball betting on hold, stressing the policy was never intended to encourage gambling and that all risks must be controlled before any further steps are taken.

news.headline: 5 arrested at Hong Kong pharmacies, anti-obesity pills and slimming injections seized
news.summary:
Hong Kong authorities have arrested five men at registered pharmacies and seized thousands of unregistered anti-obesity medicines and boxes of slimming injections, vowing to launch more joint operations to clamp down on illegal sales across the city.

news.headline: Outlook for China stocks brightens on capital flows, rebounding home prices
